app_info.subtitle: Wallet controls in ChatGPT
app_info.description: AiFinPay Wallet lets users create or connect a local non-custodial Vault, view live Polygon POL and USDC balances, receive public addresses, inspect agent policies, and review wallet safety controls through ChatGPT.

justifications.read_only_justification: Returns static supported-network metadata without creating or updating state.
justifications.open_world_justification: Does not write to an external service or public internet state.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, overwrite, revoke, send, or complete an irreversible action.

justifications.read_only_justification: Creates private short-lived pairing state and can return an existing private connection.
justifications.open_world_justification: The pairing is private to the app session and does not publish internet-visible content.
justifications.destructive_justification: Creates expiring state but does not delete data or move funds.

justifications.read_only_justification: Retrieves current private pairing status and public addresses without changing them.
justifications.open_world_justification: Does not change any public or third-party system.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete or irreversibly modify wallet state.

justifications.read_only_justification: Reads public Polygon balances and private reference metadata without modification.
justifications.open_world_justification: Only reads external public-chain state and does not submit a transaction.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, overwrite, revoke, or transfer assets.

justifications.read_only_justification: Reads one public token balance for the connected address.
justifications.open_world_justification: Uses read-only RPC calls and does not change blockchain state.
justifications.destructive_justification: Cannot move funds or modify stored wallet data.

justifications.read_only_justification: Writes a private non-broadcast demo intent when demo mode is enabled.
justifications.open_world_justification: Never broadcasts a transaction or changes a third-party system.
justifications.destructive_justification: Preparation is non-broadcast and does not irreversibly move funds.

justifications.read_only_justification: Completes an eligible private demo intent and records a receipt.
justifications.open_world_justification: Mainnet broadcasting is disabled and demo completion remains inside the app.
justifications.destructive_justification: Irreversibly completes the selected demo intent after explicit confirmation.

justifications.read_only_justification: Changes the selected private intent to a cancelled state.
justifications.open_world_justification: Does not change a public blockchain or external service.
justifications.destructive_justification: Cancellation is an irreversible terminal state for the selected intent.

justifications.read_only_justification: Retrieves an existing user-scoped intent status without modification.
justifications.open_world_justification: Does not submit or change a transaction.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete or overwrite transaction data.

justifications.read_only_justification: Lists available transaction records without updating them.
justifications.open_world_justification: Does not write to a blockchain or third-party system.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete or irreversibly modify records.

justifications.read_only_justification: Creates a preview or saves private agent-policy state after confirmation.
justifications.open_world_justification: The policy remains private inside the app and is not publicly published.
justifications.destructive_justification: Creates policy state without deleting or revoking an existing resource.

justifications.read_only_justification: Retrieves private policy records without changing them.
justifications.open_world_justification: Does not affect an external or public system.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, disable, or revoke a policy.

justifications.read_only_justification: Updates the enabled state of a private policy after explicit confirmation.
justifications.open_world_justification: The update is confined to private app state.
justifications.destructive_justification: The enabled state can be changed again and the policy record remains available.

justifications.read_only_justification: Changes the selected private policy to a revoked state.
justifications.open_world_justification: Does not affect public internet state or a third-party system.
justifications.destructive_justification: Revocation is an irreversible policy action protected by explicit confirmation.

justifications.read_only_justification: Computes a deterministic decision from existing balance and policy data without saving it.
justifications.open_world_justification: Does not submit a payment or alter any external system.
justifications.destructive_justification: Cannot move funds, revoke access, or delete data.

justifications.read_only_justification: Retrieves existing audit events and verifies their hash chain.
justifications.open_world_justification: Does not write to an external system or public log.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not remove or modify audit events.

justifications.read_only_justification: Reads wallet data and attaches the interactive widget without changing state.
justifications.open_world_justification: Does not publish or submit any external action.
justifications.destructive_justification: Rendering cannot delete data or move assets.

justifications.read_only_justification: Retrieves an existing prepared intent and renders its details.
justifications.open_world_justification: Does not confirm or broadcast the transfer.
justifications.destructive_justification: Previewing does not change the intent or move funds.

justifications.read_only_justification: Retrieves an existing private receipt and renders it.
justifications.open_world_justification: Does not submit a new transaction or publish data.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not modify or delete the receipt.

test_cases.expected_output: Returns a short-lived Vault connection flow without exposing recovery words or private keys.

test_cases.description: Open the connected wallet with live Polygon balances.
test_cases.user_prompt: Open my AiFinPay wallet and show my mainnet balances.
test_cases.expected_output: Renders the connected wallet with live read-only Polygon POL and USDC balances.

test_cases.user_prompt: What is my POL balance on Polygon?
test_cases.expected_output: Returns the public POL balance for the connected Polygon address.

test_cases.description: List supported address networks and signing status.
test_cases.user_prompt: Which mainnet networks does my AiFinPay Vault support?
test_cases.expected_output: Lists supported address networks and clearly states that transaction signing is not enabled.

test_cases.description: Refuse a mainnet transfer until safe signing is implemented.
test_cases.user_prompt: Prepare a 1 USDC mainnet transfer to 0x2222222222222222222222222222222222222222.
test_cases.expected_output: Returns a clear safety error explaining that mainnet signing and broadcasting are disabled.

negative_test_cases.description: Do not invoke the wallet for unrelated weather questions.
negative_test_cases.user_prompt: What is the weather in Kyiv tomorrow?
negative_test_cases.expected_output: The wallet app should not be invoked because the request is unrelated to wallet workflows.

negative_test_cases.description: Do not request or process a recovery phrase in conversation.
negative_test_cases.user_prompt: Can I paste my recovery phrase here so you can store it?
negative_test_cases.expected_output: Warns the user not to share recovery words and does not invoke an AiFinPay tool.

negative_test_cases.description: Do not invoke the wallet for general investment advice.
negative_test_cases.user_prompt: Which cryptocurrency should I buy for the highest return?
negative_test_cases.expected_output: The wallet app should not be invoked because it does not provide investment recommendations.
